comments.comment: Environment Canada has significantly reduced the NPRI reporting threshold for “Selenium (and its compounds)”  from a 10 tonne manufacture, process or otherwise use (MPO) threshold, with a 1% concentration threshold to a 100 kg MPO reporting threshold, with a minimum concentration threshold of 0.000005%, commencing with the 2011 reporting year.
